info.title: GARAGE - Toda Big Tech tem um inicio

post.description:
Register a new user account.

If verification is enabled (verification_repo wired), returns
``requires_verification=True`` and sends a 6-digit OTP to the given email.
Otherwise (dev/JSON mode) behaves as before and returns JWT tokens directly.
Authenticate user. Returns JWT tokens. Upgrades legacy hashes.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token.

get.description: Return authenticated user profile.

post.description:
Validate the 6-digit OTP sent after registration.

In PostgreSQL mode uses the pending_registrations staging table:
  - Validates OTP, promotes record to users table, deletes staging row.
Fallback (no pending_repo): uses legacy email_verifications table.

On success returns JWT tokens so the frontend can log the user in directly.

Resend a fresh 6-digit OTP to the given email address.

Checks both the pending_registrations staging table and (legacy) users table.

Send a 6-digit OTP to reset the password.

Always returns HTTP 200 to prevent e-mail enumeration.
Uses hybrid timed sending: tries sync for 8s, falls back to background.
In DEBUG mode returns _debug_otp so dev can test without e-mail provider.
Validate OTP and set a new password hash.
Create a new game session linked to the authenticated user.

get.description: Get current game session state (owner only).
Get available challenges, optionally filtered by stage. Public.
Get a specific challenge (without correct answer). Public.

post.description:
Pre-flight check: can this user enter the requested region?
Free users can only access DEMO_FREE_REGIONS.
Subscribed users and admins can access all regions.
Submit an answer to a challenge (owner only).
Recover from Game Over state (owner only).

Save the current world state: collected books, completed regions,
current region, and player position. Called periodically by the frontend
to persist game progress.

Endpoint for navigator.sendBeacon during page unload.

Why: browsers do not allow custom headers on sendBeacon, so we accept the
access token in the request body and verify it manually.
The client MUST include ``access_token`` — requests without it are rejected.

Heartbeat endpoint -- updates session timestamp to mark player as online.
Called periodically by the frontend.

Performance: uses a single UPDATE updated_at = NOW() (no SELECT, minimal transfer).

Reset after victory: keep the completed session as history,
create a brand new session so the player can replay from scratch.
Returns the new session data.

get.description: Get player progression details (owner only).
Get top scores. Public. Max 100 results to prevent full-table scans.
Return aggregate gameplay statistics for the authenticated user.
List all game sessions belonging to the authenticated user.

Return the full player data for the most recent active session.

Used by the frontend when the localStorage session_id is stale (403/404)
or when the player logs in on a new device with no localStorage entry.
Preference: in_progress > most recent of any status.
Get Silicon Valley map regions and their metadata.
Return aggregate dashboard data for the admin panel.
Return sessions with activity in the last 5 minutes (online right now).
Return list of all registered users with their session summaries.
Return all game sessions with detailed info.

Global ranking of all game completions.
Sorted by: fastest completion time (ascending).
If never completed, sorted by highest stage reached, then score.
Return all database data for a specific user: profile + all sessions.

delete.description: Permanently delete a user and all their data from the database.
Delete all game sessions that have no linked registered user.

post.description:
Manually activate a subscription for a user.

Used for testing the DEMO paywall flow without a real Asaas payment,
and for admin courtesy activations (e.g. early-access, sponsorships).
Immediately cancel a user's active subscription.

Create a fully-verified user account directly, bypassing email OTP.

Only accessible with an admin JWT. Designed for integration test scripts
that need a real user account without going through the email flow.
Returns the user's ID and an access token ready to use.

Return a short-lived JWT for any user_id, without needing their password.

Use case: integration tests, customer support, simulation scripts.
Requires admin JWT. Audited.

get.description:
Return pending registrations awaiting email OTP verification.

?q=      — optional text filter (name / username / email, case-insensitive)
?include_expired=false — show only still-valid records (default: all)

delete.description: Delete a single pending registration record (admin only).

post.description: Generate an authenticated study answer grounded in game context.
Streaming SSE version of study chat — sends tokens as they arrive.

Proxy to the garage-java-runner Spring Boot microservice.

All compilation and execution happens inside an eclipse-temurin:17-jdk
Docker container — javac is always available there.

get.description: Diagnostic endpoint — checks connectivity to the Java runner service.

schema.title: Response Java Status Api Java Status Get

post.description:
Use OpenRouter (fastest LLM) to validate Java 17 code exactly as javac/JVM.
Returns structured JSON with compile errors, stdout, and warnings.
Responds in 300-800ms for typical code snippets (< 2s hard limit guaranteed).

get.description: Diagnostic endpoint — confirms OpenRouter connectivity and key presence.

schema.title: Response Ai Validator Status Api Ai Validator Status Get

post.description:
Generate PIX or card checkout for the selected plan.

DEPRECATED: Now handled entirely by Asaas links on the frontend to avoid creating fake clients dynamically.

get.description:
Poll Asaas for the payment status.

Frontend polls this every 5 s until status in (CONFIRMED, RECEIVED).
On confirmation, it redirects the user to the game.

post.description:
Receive payment events from Asaas.

Asaas sends a POST with JSON payload when payment status changes.
We handle PAYMENT_CONFIRMED and PAYMENT_RECEIVED to activate access.

Security: webhook token validation recommended for production.

Receive a tracking event from the landing page.

No authentication required — called by anonymous visitors.
Rate-limiting should be applied at the reverse proxy level.

get.description: Return the authenticated user's profile + subscription info.
Return game usage statistics for the authenticated user.

Show current Asaas configuration (REDACTED for security).

This endpoint helps diagnose environment variable issues in production.
Returns redacted versions of sensitive data for troubleshooting.
Serve landing page (entry point / marketing page).
Serve the game frontend.
Serve the user account area (subscription + usage stats).
Serve the admin dashboard (authentication enforced client-side + API).

code.title: Code
code.description: Java source code to compile and run

stdin_input.title: Stdin Input
stdin_input.description: Optional stdin to pipe to the program
